title: Do UFOs Navigate Telepathically?
summary: This interview excerpt discusses the theory that UFOs may be navigated telepathically, with built-in AI systems responding to pilot thought control. The conversation touches on the physics of telepathy and remote viewing, suggesting these phenomena may be reducible to subtle dimensions of physics.

acronyms.definition: Referenced as a capacity built into UFO craft that responds telepathically to pilot control

key_claims.claim: UFOs appear to be navigated telepathically
UFO craft have built-in AI capacity to respond telepathically to pilot control
Telepathy and remote viewing are reducible to subtle dimensions of physics
